hypothesis: In the synthesis of Ca2SiO4, augmenting the workflow to include furnace energy consumption derived from temperature-dependent heat capacities under 60% thermal efficiency and purification costs estimated from predicted byproduct solubilities will reverse the current cost ranking such that the Ca3SiO5 + SiO2 route yields at least 20% more grams of ≥95% pure Ca2SiO4 per euro than the CaO + SiO2 route for 100–500 kg batches processed at 1200–1400°C.
